clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Standardized patient preparation protocol to ensure accurate, reproducible blood pressure measurements
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Before every BP measurement (initial visit, medication adjustment, symptom check, home monitoring)
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Patient readiness confirmation + proper positioning checklist before BP reading

navigationPath.purpose: Verify no smoking, caffeine, or exercise within 30 minutes
Ensure quiet room, comfortable temperature, private area
Interactive guide for proper cuff placement on bare arm
Ensure arm supported at heart level
Verify chair position: feet flat, legs uncrossed, back supported
Final check before proceeding to measurement

armBare.validation: Must be true (no clothing on cuff arm)

cuffSize.note: Bladder length 80% of arm circumference, width 40%

validationRules: All required fields must be true before proceeding
If any pre-measurement activity (smoking/caffeine/exercise) within 30min → delay measurement or reschedule
Cuff must be on bare arm (no clothing, rolled sleeves)
Bottom of cuff directly above antecubital fossa (elbow bend)
Minimum 5 minutes rest in correct position

rules: Check smoking, caffeine, exercise within 30 minutes → if yes, flag and recommend waiting 30 minutes
Verify cuff placement: bare arm, bottom of cuff 1-2 cm above elbow crease
Verify arm positioning: supported (on table or pillow), mid-sternum level
Verify body positioning: seated, back supported, legs uncrossed, feet flat
If positioning incorrect → show correction instructions
Start 5-minute rest timer only when all positioning criteria met
After 5 minutes, confirm patient still in correct position
All criteria met → ready for BP measurement

positioningRequirements.requirement: Bottom of cuff directly above elbow bend
positioningRequirements.instruction: Position cuff 1-2 cm above antecubital fossa
Rest arm on table or pillow at mid-sternum height
Keep legs uncrossed throughout rest and measurement
Sit back in chair, not on edge

category.description: e.g., 'Ready for measurement' or 'Not ready - action needed'

blockingFactors.description: List of unmet criteria preventing measurement

correctionInstructions.description: Specific actions to resolve blocking factors

appDisplay.button: Proceed to BP measurement (only when ready)

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Ensure all preparation steps documented before accepting BP reading
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: N/A - preparation is immediate before measurement
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: If patient unable to complete preparation (e.g., can't rest 5 minutes), document and consider alternate approach
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: If patient repeatedly cannot meet preparation criteria, flag for workflow adjustment
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log preparation completion status with each BP measurement
